title: T8 Doc truth: Truth-reconciliation pass — strategy-doc status lines match shipped engine/ reality
prompt: Docs lag code in dark-factory: docs/north-star.md still says C2 is 'next' and the trigger is 'unsolved' (both shipped — C2 proven 2026-06-06, the dispatch spine landed as engine/ 2026-07-04→06); docs/runtime-model.md points operators at the retired experiments/watchtower-engine/ queue instead of engine/store/queue/ + orchestrator.py; docs/harness-evaluation.md says 'evaluation only, no code changed' when its promotion-plan Phases 1–3 (warm pool + API-key guard, CAP=3/BACKOFF 429 governor, kind-filter, generalized VERIFIERS, HITL gate, audit.jsonl) are built; docs/six-app-evaluation-2026-07-04.md lists as missing several items shipped within 48h (engine status.py, VERIFIERS registry, omi-fetch lookup.py --search, kdd-viewer query.py) while others stay genuinely open (project-digest --list, engine/find.py); engine/docs/ENGINE-NOTES.md's auto-wake row says 'Not built' but engine/wake.py + launchd + bin/factory-wake exist (disarmed). Fix all five with additive, dated, evidence-cited reconciliation blocks — original analysis preserved verbatim, every claim backed by a captured command output in backlog/wargames/proof/T8-01/EVIDENCE.md, SHIPPED vs PARTIAL vs STILL OPEN distinguished honestly ('built, disarmed' / 'wired, unexercised' — never 'proven' without a proof artifact), open items pointing at their war-game tickets (T1-01, T1-02, T1-03, T1-11, T2-03). Write the closure report at backlog/wargames/proof/T8-01/REPORT.md, then commit and push exactly the five docs + proof dir. Never rewrite doc prose beyond the addenda, never touch engine code, CLAUDE.md, architecture.md, appydave-plugins, or sibling apps (read-only evidence checks only). Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T8-01-doc-truth-reconciliation.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: Each doc carries its dated block exactly once: grep -c 'Correction (2026-07-06' docs/north-star.md == 1; grep -c 'Status update (2026-07-06' docs/runtime-model.md == 1; grep -c 'Update 2026-07-06' docs/harness-evaluation.md == 1; grep -c 'Since shipped' docs/six-app-evaluation-2026-07-04.md == 1; grep -c 'wg-t8-01' engine/docs/ENGINE-NOTES.md == 2. Originals preserved: 'evaluation only. No code changed.' still greps 1 in harness-evaluation.md, 'Correction (2026-06-05)' still 1 in north-star.md, the six-app verdict table row '| omi-fetch (v2) | 2/5' still 1, and every target file's wc -l grew from the authoring baselines (84/85/116/231/88). Open-work pointers present: T1-01 in harness-evaluation.md, T1-03 in north-star.md, T2-03 in six-app-evaluation-2026-07-04.md. backlog/wargames/proof/T8-01/EVIDENCE.md and REPORT.md exist; the wg-t8-01 commit is pushed and its stat touches only the five docs + proof dir. Negative: no engine/*.py, CLAUDE.md, architecture.md, research/, canonical/, or appydave-plugins changes.
